HESP889 Doctoral Candidacy Research (1-3 Credits)

Doctoral candidacy paper research

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral)) ; and permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

HESP898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) HESP899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)
